query:
-- Add new test types for this batch
INSERT IGNORE INTO test_types (code, name, category, standard, description, form_template, is_active, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES
  ('CONC_FOAM_CUBE',       'Foamed Concrete Compressive Strength',           'concrete',   'BS EN 12390-3',       'Compressive strength of foamed concrete cubes',                     'concrete_foam',           1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('CONC_FOAM_DENSITY',    'Foamed Concrete Fresh Density',                  'concrete',   'BS EN 12350-6',       'Fresh density of foamed concrete mix',                              'concrete_foam',           1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('CONC_MIX_GRAD',        'Concrete Aggregate Combined Gradation',          'concrete',   'ASTM C33',            'Combined gradation of coarse and fine aggregate for concrete mix',  'concrete_mix_grad',       1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('STEEL_STRUCTURAL',     'Structural Steel Tensile Test',                  'steel',      'BS EN 10025 / ASTM A36','Tensile test for structural steel sections',                     'steel_structural',        1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('STEEL_ANCHOR_M12',     'Anchor Bolt Pull-out Test M12',                  'steel',      'ASTM E488 / BS 8539', 'Pull-out test for M12 anchor bolts',                                'steel_anchor_bolt',       1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('STEEL_ANCHOR_M16',     'Anchor Bolt Pull-out Test M16',                  'steel',      'ASTM E488 / BS 8539', 'Pull-out test for M16 anchor bolts',                                'steel_anchor_bolt',       1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('STEEL_ANCHOR_M20',     'Anchor Bolt Pull-out Test M20',                  'steel',      'ASTM E488 / BS 8539', 'Pull-out test for M20 anchor bolts',                                'steel_anchor_bolt',       1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('STEEL_ANCHOR_M24',     'Anchor Bolt Pull-out Test M24',                  'steel',      'ASTM E488 / BS 8539', 'Pull-out test for M24 anchor bolts',                                'steel_anchor_bolt',       1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('STEEL_ANCHOR_M30',     'Anchor Bolt Pull-out Test M30',                  'steel',      'ASTM E488 / BS 8539', 'Pull-out test for M30 anchor bolts',                                'steel_anchor_bolt',       1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_EXTRACTED_SIEVE_ACWC', 'Extracted Aggregate Sieve Analysis (ACWC)','asphalt',    'BS EN 12697-2',       'Sieve analysis of extracted aggregate from ACWC mix',               'asphalt_extracted_sieve', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_EXTRACTED_SIEVE_ACBC', 'Extracted Aggregate Sieve Analysis (ACBC)','asphalt',    'BS EN 12697-2',       'Sieve analysis of extracted aggregate from ACBC mix',               'asphalt_extracted_sieve', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_EXTRACTED_SIEVE_DBM',  'Extracted Aggregate Sieve Analysis (DBM)', 'asphalt',    'BS EN 12697-2',       'Sieve analysis of extracted aggregate from DBM mix',                'asphalt_extracted_sieve', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_SPRAY_SS1',       'Tack Coat Spray Rate (SS-1)',                    'asphalt',    'JKR Spec / BS 594-1', 'Spray rate test for SS-1 tack coat',                                'asphalt_spray_rate',      1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_SPRAY_SS1H',      'Tack Coat Spray Rate (SS-1h)',                   'asphalt',    'JKR Spec / BS 594-1', 'Spray rate test for SS-1h tack coat',                               'asphalt_spray_rate',      1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_SPRAY_CRS1',      'Tack Coat Spray Rate (CRS-1)',                   'asphalt',    'JKR Spec',            'Spray rate test for CRS-1 tack coat',                               'asphalt_spray_rate',      1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_SPRAY_MC30',      'Prime Coat Spray Rate (MC-30)',                  'asphalt',    'JKR Spec / ASTM D2027','Spray rate test for MC-30 prime coat',                            'asphalt_spray_rate',      1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_SPRAY_MC70',      'Prime Coat Spray Rate (MC-70)',                  'asphalt',    'JKR Spec / ASTM D2027','Spray rate test for MC-70 prime coat',                            'asphalt_spray_rate',      1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('ASPH_SPRAY_MC250',     'Prime Coat Spray Rate (MC-250)',                 'asphalt',    'JKR Spec / ASTM D2027','Spray rate test for MC-250 prime coat',                           'asphalt_spray_rate',      1, NOW(), NOW());
